cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out which statement is true based on the passage. Let me read through the options again and check the passage for each one. Option A says that last fall there was the second lowest number of grown salmon returning on record. The passage mentions that "only about 90,000 adult salmon returned to the Central Valley last fall--the second lowest number on record..." So that matches. A seems correct. Option B states that salmon migrate to the ocean when they grow up. The passage says, "wild salmon are born in streams and rivers, migrate to the ocean when they're juveniles..." So it's when they're juveniles, not when they grow up. So B is incorrect. Option C claims that farm-raised salmon isn't as delicious and nutritious. The passage mentions that there will be abundant supplies
